title: Trump returns to campaign trail uncertain who he's running against
shortDescription: Trump plans to spend Friday at his golf club in New Jersey before joining VP running mate JD Vance in Grand Rapids, Mich., for a Saturday rally.

title: Did the Secret Service's delayed evacuation fail to protect Trump?
shortDescription: That Donald Trump stopped and stood upright when leaving the stage after the assassination attempt is another possible failure by Secret Service

title: How long was Donald Trump's RNC acceptance speech? Record-setting
shortDescription: Donald Trump accepted the nomination for Republican presidential candidate in Milwaukee. He spoke for more than 92 minutes, the longest in history.

title: Donald Trump shares the immigration chart that he says saved his life
shortDescription: Donald Trump shared the immigration chart he was trying to see right before his assassination attempt on Saturday at a Pennsylvania rally.

title: Trump recuenta por primera vez momento en que sufrió atentado
shortDescription: El ex presidente Donald Trump detalló durante su discurso en la convención republicana los momentos después de que una bala impactó su oido.

title: United Auto Workers criticize Trump after he attacks leader at RNC
shortDescription: UAW leader “should be fired,” comment by Trump drew a swift social media response from Shawn Fain.

title: Trump talks faith in God at emotional RNC speech
shortDescription: Trump said God was on his side as a would-be assassin fired shots at him last Saturday. His remarks capped an RNC awash with religious language.

title: Trump 3.0: Kinder-and-gentler, but with warnings of apocalypse, too
shortDescription: A near-death experience seems to have had an impact, but his attacks were still fierce against Democrats -- whichever one he ends up running against.

title: Trump gives his acceptance speech for the Republican nomination
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump accepts the Republican nomination in a 92-minute speech that was the longest acceptance address in modern history.

title: Which Trumps were at final night of RNC?
shortDescription: The former president was not the only Trump to be in the spotlight at the Republican National Convention this week.

title: Trump details assassination attempt in RNC speech
shortDescription: In his opening remarks at the Republican National Convention, former President Donald Trump described the assassination attempt at a campaign rally.

title: Takeaways: Somber Trump acceptance speech turns into grievance list
shortDescription: Trump used his speech to recount the assassination attempt on him, saying it would be the only time he does so.

title: Trump recalls the moment he was shot in assassination attempt
shortDescription: Donald Trump took the stage at the RNC and shared a personal account of his assassination attempt last week.

title: Donald Trump's tribute to Corey Comperatore
shortDescription: After accepting the Republican nomination, former President Donald Trump paid tribute to Corey Comperatore, a supporter killed at his rally.

title: Donald Trump accepts Republican nomination at RNC
shortDescription: The former president formally accepted the Republican nomination for president for a third time, thanking a Milwaukee crowd.

title: Trump rally shooting victims fundraiser tops $6 million
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump said the fundraiser for rally shooting victims, including the family of Corey Comperatore, had topped $6 million.

title: Trump accepts Republican nomination at RNC: Watch the speech
shortDescription: Donald Trump formally accepted the nomination of the Republican Party to close out the RNC. Watch the speech.

title: Trump uses RNC acceptance speech to honor slain rally goer
shortDescription: Donald Trump honored the memory of Corey Comperatore, the firefighter killed during the assassination attempt on him, at the RNC Thursday night.

title: RNC speeches: UFC CEO Dana White endorses Trump
shortDescription: Dana White, CEO of Ultimate Fighting Championship, endorsed former President Donald Trump at the Republican National Convention.

title: Dana White introduces Trump at 2024 RNC
shortDescription: Dana White, CEO of Ultimate Fighting Championship, delivered remarks at the 2024 Republican National Convention in Milwaukee.

title: Hunter Biden hopes ruling in Trump case will get his charges tossed
shortDescription: After a Trump-appointed judge dismissed his charges over special counsel's appointment, Hunter Biden wants his charges dismissed on the same grounds

title: Eric Trump’s full 2024 RNC speech
shortDescription: Eric Trump took the stage at the 2024 Republican National Convention in Milwaukee to show his support for his father.

title: Outside RNC, 'political orphans' resisting Trump's GOP seek a path
shortDescription: Reluctant Trump voters now say they feel "politically homeless" in their own party.

title: Tucker Carlson thanks 'divine intervention' after Trump shooting
shortDescription: The former FOX News host praised former President Donald Trump during his remarks at the Republican National Convention Thursday.

title: What does Nate Silver think about Biden's chances of winning?
shortDescription: As calls for Joe Biden to step down increase, statistician Nate Silver shares his data on Biden's chances of winning.
